channel.title: Examples on Pixyn Framework
channel.description: Recent content in Examples on Pixyn Framework

item.title: Basic Setup Example
item.description: This example demonstrates the minimum code needed to create a Pixyn application. Complete Example import { PixynApp } from 'pixyn'; const app = new PixynApp({ width: 800, height: 600, backgroundColor: 0x1099bb, }); document.body.appendChild(app.view); app.start(); Expected Result A blue (0x1099bb) canvas will appear with dimensions 800x600. Running the Example Create a new TypeScript file Copy the code above Run with your preferred bundler (Vite, Webpack, etc.) Next Steps Entity System Example - Add game objects Input Handling Example - Add interactivity
